name: Oaktree Acquisition Corp. III Life Sciences
business: Oaktree Acquisition Corp. III Life Sciences is a blank check company formed to effect a merger or acquisition with a target business, focusing on healthcare or healthcare-related industries. It has not yet selected a business combination target and has generated no operating revenues.

exposures.sentence: In particular, we intend to target North American, British or European companies in the biopharmaceutical, medical devices, diagnostics, and specialized healthcare services sectors where our management has extensive investment experience.

In particular, we intend to target North American, British or European companies in the biopharmaceutical, medical devices, diagnostics, and specialized healthcare services sectors where our management has extensive investment experience.

While we may pursue an acquisition opportunity in any business, industry, sector, or geographical location, we intend to focus on industries that complement our management team s background, and to capitalize on the ability of our management team to identify and acquire a business, focusing on the healthcare or healthcare-related industries.
